title: Haven't Met You Yet
why_this_song: Haven't Met You Yet by Michael Bublé (2009) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: I just haven't met you yet
But I won't need to fight it
I just haven't met you yet
To give so much more than I get
I said love, love, love, love

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "work" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "work" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "know" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "know" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I'm not surprised, not everything lasts
And now I can see every possibility, mmm
And I'll work to work it out

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Talk myself in, I talk myself out
Oh, you know it'll all turn out

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Haven't Met You Yet" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Haven't Met You Yet" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Haven't Met You Yet" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Haven't Met You Yet", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Haven't Met You Yet" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Haven't Met You Yet" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Haven't Met You Yet" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Haven't Met You Yet" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?
